ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account (hashed for security) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio description of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "header_image" TEXT /* File path to the user's header image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet has received */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is pinned by the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that was retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the retweet was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who followed another user */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the follow was created */,
  "is_muted" INTEGER /* Whether the user has muted the followed user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtag_tweets" (
  "hashtag_tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag usage */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that used the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag used in the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtag_tweets_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtag_tweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that mentioned a user */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was mentioned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mention was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "direct_messages" (
  "direct_message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each direct message */,
  "sender_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the direct message */,
  "receiver_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the direct message */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the direct message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the direct message was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the direct message was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direct_message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_direct_messages_receiver_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_direct_messages_sender_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that the media file is attached to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the media file was uploaded */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (image, video, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that the URL is shared in */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL shared in the tweet */,
  "expanded_url" TEXT /* Expanded URL (in case of shortened URLs) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the URL was shared */,
  "url_title" TEXT /* Title of the URL */,
  "url_description" TEXT /* Description of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "blocker_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who blocked another user */,
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was blocked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the block was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_blocks_blocked_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocked_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_blocks_blocker_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocker_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_mutes" (
  "mute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mute */,
  "muter_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who muted another user */,
  "muted_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was muted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mute was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_mutes_muted_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("muted_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_mutes_muter_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("muter_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "reporter_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported another user */,
  "reported_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was reported */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reports_reporter_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reports_reported_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g. likes, retweets, etc.) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics data was collected */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of the analytics data (e.g. tweet, user, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "GitHub_accounts" (
  "github_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GitHub account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who connected the GitHub account */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the connected account */,
  "access_token" TEXT /* Access token for the connected GitHub account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("github_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_GitHub_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "StackOverflow_accounts" (
  "stackoverflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each StackOverflow account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who connected the StackOverflow account */,
  "stackoverflow_username" TEXT /* StackOverflow username of the connected account */,
  "access_token" TEXT /* Access token for the connected StackOverflow account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stackoverflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_StackOverflow_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
